title: Planning mode should allow more text to be entered
description: Planning mode should allow more text to be entered. Don’t limit it

log.outcome: This is a well-crafted, focused specification for a straightforward UI improvement. summary: Removed the 500-character limit from the Planning Mode initial plan textarea in packages/dashboard/app/components/PlanningModeModal.tsx. Changes include: (1) removed `.slice(0, 500)` from the onChange handler, (2) removed `maxLength={500}` attribute, (3) removed the character count display div. All 17 PlanningModeModal tests pass, build succeeds, and changeset file created for the user-facing improvement.
